## Here We Meet

Where science meets guidance 

 clarity builds trust, and design becomes an experience.

#### Real transparency — by design

We use clearly defined ingredients and categorize them transparently, so you can understand what goes into each recipe and why.

#### Intelligent formulas

Our recipe logic is built with AI-supported matching of structure and ingredient compatibility. Combinations are designed to support stable, repeatable batches and consistent formulation behavior — with room to adjust based on your inputs and preferences.

#### Clear & Clean

Our formulas are designed to support different formulation goals and provide a flexible foundation you can refine over time.

#### Logic with Vision

The system evolves through user feedback and data-informed recommendations, helping you discover and refine recipes over time.

[First steps](https://mevidual.com/#how-it-works)

#### me:vidualism 101

 This is for everyone who reads ingredient labels.

 Who thinks in processes, not products.

 Who tests, tweaks, and tries again.

 Who tracks temperature, timing, and texture.

 Who documents results—so they can be repeated.

 Who asks better questions.

 Who searches—and joins the Research Collective.

[Read more](https://mevidual.com/pages/researcher)

## Your formulas — as individual as you are.

Choose your focus. Personalize with recipe suggestions based on your inputs and preferences.

###### The Synthor.

## Choose a formula that matches your selected parameters — recommended by the app and mixed by you.

Once you’ve selected your recipe, the app syncs with Synthor. It guides you step by step through the mixing workflow — what to add, when to add it, and how. Synthor handles the process steps: mixing, heating, emulsifying, and cooling — with repeatable, app-controlled parameters. Thoughtfully designed recipes. Mixed by you, at home.

![Image 10](https://mevidual.com/cdn/shop/files/2_90abe99c-5139-4c26-a48e-e76eca575a4e_300x300.jpg?v=1745581507)

## FAQ

##### What does the system do – and is it easy to use?

 You will be able to select a science-based formulation framework through our app, which guides you step-by-step on how to add each ingredient. The Synthor acts as your technical mixing assistant, connecting via Bluetooth to manage precise process parameters like temperature and mixing speed. This ensures a professional self-manufacturing process at home. While currently in the final validation phase for our May 2026 launch, the workflow is designed to be intuitive, providing clear guidance for every batch. 

##### Can I adjust my formula over time?

 Absolutely. The system is built on the principle of user authority. If your skincare needs change, you use the app to actively re-configure your requirements. Instead of just picking a finished product, you adjust the parameters within our science-based frameworks. The AI acts as your technical consultant, ensuring that your specific choices—such as the deliberate decision to omit preservatives for a "fresh-batch" experience—remain within safe, validated limits. You are the one refining the routine; the system simply provides the professional tools to do so.
